response: MOORE'S LAW WILL EVENTUALLY STOP DUE TO PHYSICAL LIMITATIONS IN SEMICONDUCTOR MANUFACTURING AND HEAT DISSIPATION ISSUES THAT PREVENT FURTHER SHRINKING OF TRANSISTORS *** THE SPECULATION IS THAT THIS CEASEMENT WILL OCCUR WITHIN THE NEXT DECADE AS INNOVATION SHIFTS TOWARD NEW ARCHITECTURES AND MATERIALS RATHER THAN SIMPLY REDUCING SIZE MOORE
